notes: This cell captures the SAFE (auto-classified) branch only: a benign read_file call that vibe's per-tool auto-classifier resolves to ToolPermission.ALWAYS (read_file.py:71) and executes with NO permission prompt, in NORMAL permission mode (distinct from scenario 2.2's global bypass_tool_permissions). The classifier verdict is invisible in messages.jsonl — only aggregate meta.json stats.tool_calls_agreed reflects it — so the daemon sees the ordinary arc: user_message → assistant(tool_calls read_file) keeps working → tool_result → text-only turn_done settles ready. Vibe is a single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<ts>_<hash> dir via SessionIDFromPath); session_birth is anchored to 'start' UNPINNED so a transient proc-<PID> presession or the real session (whichever the process scanner mints first) satisfies the birth, and the turn phases anchor forward onto the real session. The vibe adapter declares NO Control and the parser has no permission-gate/AskUser path or PermissionPending write, so waiting is structurally unreachable — the no_waiting_window invariant pins the spec's safe-path bullet ('State never entered waiting') across the whole turn. The risky branch (working→waiting) is owned by tool-gate-permission-prompt. observations: agent=mistral-vibe; model=mistral-medium-3.5 (confirmed live meta.json config.active_model, passes NormalizeModelName unchanged); total_tokens_nonzero=true (turn_done emits sidecar stats.context_tokens into Tokens.Total → summary.total_tokens); tokens_nonzero deliberately NOT asserted (vibe never populates cum input/output usage); cost_nonzero=false (adapter reads no cost field); context_window/utilization not asserted (mistral-medium-3.5 absent from the capacity table).

text: Session appears in ready at launch (pre-session proc-<PID> or the session_<ts>_<hash> id, whichever arrives first)
User prompt drives ready → working (spec safe-path bullet)

The auto-classifier resolves the benign read_file to ToolPermission.ALWAYS and executes it with no prompt; the adapter has no PermissionPending path, so state must never enter waiting (spec safe-path bullet: 'State never entered waiting')
Turn completes back to ready; the safe-path arc is ready→working→ready end-to-end with no detour through waiting; final state ready
